titleStmt.title: SII 36.133: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 133. (A.R. No. 133 of 1910.) TEṈKARAI, NILAKKOTTAI TALUK, MADURA DISTRICT. On a third pillar of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Mūlasthāṉēśvara temple.

summary.p: The inscription is related to No. 131 above. Though the name of the king is not mentioned in the inscription he may be identified with Sundara Pāṇḍya I with reference to the inscription since the same officer (Maḻavarāyaṉ) appear in both the inscriptions.

Records an order of the king issued to śrīkāryam and śrīvaishaṇavas in the temple of Śrivallava Viṇṇagar Ālvār on the western bank (of the Vaigai river ?), in the Chōḻakulāntaka-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Pāgaṉūrkūṟṟam. A piece of land measuring 3(1/2) vēlis was granted as dēvadāṉa iṟaiyili for tiruppaḍimāṟṟu offerings in the temple on a representation made by Maḻavarāyaṉ. The taxes exempted are antarāyam, viṉiyōkam and mākkalam. The uḷvari was signed by three officers.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tiribhuvaṉac cakkaravat
tikaḷ koneriṉmai
koṇṭāṉ pāka
ṉūṟ kūṟṟattuc co
ḻakulān=taka caturvve
dimaṅkalattu mel
karai śrī vallava viṇ
ṇakar Āḻvār koyi
l śrīkāryañceyvā
ṉukkum śrīvaiyiṣṇa
vaṟkum Ivvāḻvāṟ
kut tiruppaṭimāṟṟu
ḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭu nima
ntaṅkaḷukku Ivvūr pa
rākrama pāṇṭiyaṉ ka
ṭṭaḷaiil mel kūṟ
ṟil sāsrajaṉālaiya
p pilāṟṟukku meṟ
ku kūvāṇi vatikku vaṭa
kkum karuṇākara vati
kku vaṭakkum Ivvāḻ
vār kārāṇmaiyāṉa
kollai nilam Uḷḷiṭ
ṭa paḻampāṭakappaṭi
mūṉṟarai veli nila
m patiṉmūṉṟāvatiṉ
Etirāmāṇṭiṉetirā
māṇṭu mutal Aṉtarā
yamum viṉiyokamu
m mākkalamum Uḷp
paṭa tevatāṉa Iṟaii
liyāka Iṭap peṟa ve
ṇu meṉṟu maḻa
varāyaṉṉamakkuc
coṉṉamaiyil I
v vāḻvāṟkut tiru
ppaṭimāṟṟuḷḷi
ṭṭu veṇṭum ni
van=taṅkaḷukku I
vvūr parākrama pā
ṇṭiyaṉ kaṭṭaḷai
mel kūṟṟil
sāsrajaṉālayap
(melait tūṇile)
kku Ivvūr parākkra
ma pāṇṭiyaṉ ka
ṭṭaḷaiyil mel
kūṟṟil cārājanā
laiyap pilāṟṟu
kku meṟku kūvāṇi
vatikku vaṭakkum ka
ruṇākaravati vaṭakku
Ivvāḻvār kārā
ṇmaiyāṉa kollai
nilamuṭpaṭa paḻampāṭa
kappaṭi mūṉṟarai
veli nilam patiṉ mū
ṉṟāvatiṉ Etirāmā
ṇṭinetirāmāṇ
ṭu mutal Aṉtarāya
mum viṉiyokamu
mākkalamu muḷppa
ṭa tevatāṉa Iṟai
yiliyāka Iṭṭu vari
yilār Uḷvariyu ṉam
molaiyum tarac co
ṉṉom Ippaṭi kai
kkoṇṭu tiruppaṭi
māṟṟu Uḷḷiṭṭu ve
ṇṭum nimaṉtaṅkaḷ
cellap paṇṇukave
ṉṟu caṉtirātittavaṟ
celvatākak kallilu
ñ cempilum veṭṭi
vittuk koḷka veṉ
ṟu yaramāyu
nāṭu vai puṟappa
vaḷa nāṭṭup putūru
ṭaiyāṉ poṉṉiṉ
cūriyatevaṉāṉa rācen=tara
ppallavaraiyaṉ E
ḻuttu Ivai Aṇṭa nā
ṭṭup perumaṇalūr
maṉtiri Āṭkoṇṭa
tevaṉāṉa kuma rājaṉ
Eḻuttu Ivai Aṇ
ṭa nāṭṭup perumaṇa
lūr maṭīri Ātitta
tēvaṉāṉa pallavarā
jar Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 36.133 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
